code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s) s
  when None ""
  end
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(trimmed)
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  let n = parts.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let part = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(s) s
    when None ""
    end
    let v = match string.parse_int(part)
    when Some(x) x
    when None 0
    end
    let sq = v * v
    if first
      out = "#{sq}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{sq}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
  Ok(())
end
